label: National Grid (Narragansett Electric)
notes: National Grid d/b/a Narragansett Electric Company. Serves ~99% of mainland RI electric customers. Bespoke portal, adapter needs live login. Manual PDF upload meanwhile.

label: Block Island Power Company
notes: NISC SmartHub portal (blockisland.smarthub.coop, confirmed Jun 2026). Serves Block Island only (~1000 customers). Extension scrapes billing + usage. kWh unverified on a real generation meter; verify before trusting reports.

label: Pascoag Utility District
notes: Confirmed live SmartHub host via discovery sweep 2026-07-09. Very small water & electric district serving ~300 customers in Burrillville. No customer portal found (Jun 2026). Manual PDF upload only.
